problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
